aesthetic: Washi — wabi-sabi lightness, handmade paper texture, organic asymmetry
principles: Lightness is soul: weight 400 display (not 600/700), weight 300 body
Asymmetry: titles left-aligned, large right whitespace
Red #eb5757 appears once per page — like a seal stamp
No dividers — use whitespace ≥40% to separate
Writing tone: like a letter to a trusted colleague
promptGuide: Apply the Washi aesthetic: Fraunces weight 400 + SOFT 100 (organic curves), Plus Jakarta Sans weight 300 body, warm brown-black #37352f text (not pure black), warm white #faf8f4 bg (like washi paper), red #eb5757 accent once per page only (like a seal), asymmetric layouts (title left, 40%+ right whitespace), 1px warm borders rgba(55,53,47,0.08) instead of shadows, 6-8px border-radius, writing tone: 'we'/'you'/'together' allowed, no hype.
